Description: Numeric classification label for the specified newswire or story
Per-entity confidence values aligned with Score sentiment uses 0 to 100 MMN uses 0 to 1 probability of market move
Per-entity analytics score array: sentiment uses -1 negative 0 neutral 1 positive; MMN and MMN_1STPASS are 1 for tagged entities
UTC timestamp when the story was first created in Bloomberg systems
Version number of the underlying analytics model used to generate the record
Story headline text subject to entitlements
